error.signature: ros2 bag play: Clock time is not being published

verdict.summary: Nodes use use_sim_time:=true but ros2 bag play is not publishing /clock, or vice versa.

dead_ends.action: Set use_sim_time on some nodes but not others
dead_ends.why_fails: Causes TF extrapolation errors: some nodes use wall clock, others use sim time

dead_ends.action: Publish /clock manually at a fixed rate
dead_ends.why_fails: Clock must advance with bag time, not independently; manual clock causes data-time mismatch

workarounds.how: ros2 bag play my_bag --clock 100  # publishes /clock at 100 Hz

workarounds.action: Set use_sim_time:=true on ALL nodes when replaying bags
Use --rate to control playback speed while keeping clock consistent
workarounds.how: ros2 bag play my_bag --clock 100 --rate 0.5  # half speed
